'''kachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:byssally|byssally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:byssally|byssally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kachate|kachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kachatesher|kachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kachatesherĂ«m|kachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kachatero|kachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kachateshĂ«|kachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kachateshĂ«m|kachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikachatero|gokikachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikachateshĂ«|gokikachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikachateshĂ«m|gokikachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokachankerom|gokachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokachankeshĂ«|gokachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokachankeshĂ«m|gokachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokachankeya|gokachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kachaterom|kachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kachatemu|kachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kachateya|kachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikachaterom|gokikachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikachatemu|gokikachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikachateya|gokikachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kachachate|kachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kachachatesher|kachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kachachatesherĂ«m|kachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kachachatero|kachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kachachateshĂ«|kachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kachachateshĂ«m|kachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikachachatero|gokikachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikachachateshĂ«|gokikachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikachachateshĂ«m|gokikachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokachachankerom|gokachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokachachankeshĂ«|gokachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokachachankeshĂ«m|gokachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokachachankeya|gokachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kachachaterom|kachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kachachatemu|kachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kachachateya|kachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikachachaterom|gokikachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikachachatemu|gokikachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikachachateya|gokikachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠchĂŠte|kĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠchĂŠtesher|kĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠchĂŠtero|kĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠchĂŠtero|gokikĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠchĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠchĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠchĂŠterom|kĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠchĂŠtemu|kĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠchĂŠteya|kĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠchĂŠterom|gokikĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠchĂŠteya|gokikĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafchafte|kafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafchaftesher|kafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafchaftesherĂ«m|kafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafchaftero|kafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafchafteshĂ«|kafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafchafteshĂ«m|kafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafchaftero|gokikafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafchafteshĂ«|gokikafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafchafteshĂ«m|gokikafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafchafnkerom|gokafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafchafnkeshĂ«|gokafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafchafnkeshĂ«m|gokafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafchafnkeya|gokafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafchafterom|kafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafchaftemu|kafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafchafteya|kafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafchafterom|gokikafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafchaftemu|gokikafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafchafteya|gokikafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
